title: Replication package: Merit or networks? What decides where research is published
description: De-identified data and code that reproduce every table and figure in 'Merit or networks? What decides where research is published'. The package estimates a five-input production function for journal placement (text-legible idea quality, execution quality, connections, author ability, and an off-the-shelf language-model score) over 6,208 NBER working papers circulated 2010-2015. Each row is keyed by the public NBER working-paper identifier and carries only numeric derived measures, scores, and outcomes; author and editor identities are withheld for privacy and can be rebuilt independently from the public sources documented in DATA_AVAILABILITY.md.
